mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, directly boosting S&P 500 valuations and generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during rate cuts are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5 percentage points over three months signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or Rank IC < 0.03 over rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month growth in both retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand recovery, which drives corporate revenue expansion and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint growth in retail sales and housing starts fails to predict positive returns (t-test p > 0.05) or interaction term loses significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Positive month-over-month growth in industrial production during a monetary tightening cycle reflects resilient supply-side fundamentals that offset higher borrowing costs, supporting short-term positive S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Industrial production growth during tightening periods yields negative or flat forward returns, or Rank IC < 0.02 over 1-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the CPI exceeding 0.4% triggers market expectations of aggressive Federal Reserve tightening, which compresses equity valuation multiples and causes negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: High inflation readings fail to predict negative returns or are followed by positive equity performance, or signal accuracy drops below 55% in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where nonfarm payroll employment rises while the unemployment rate falls signals a robust labor market expansion without slack, supporting higher corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint labor signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.03) or fails to outperform a single-proxy baseline in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP reflects expanding macroeconomic activity and rising corporate profits, which translates directly into positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter regardless of the business cycle phase.
failure_condition: GDP growth fails to correlate with forward returns (Rank IC < 0.02) or positive GDP prints are followed by negative equity returns in > 50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month contraction in industrial production exceeding 0.5% signals severe supply-side weakness and impending economic contraction, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Sharp industrial production declines are followed by positive equity returns in > 60% of instances, or the threshold signal shows no statistical edge over random baseline.
